title: Algebraic testing — verifying explicit algebraic laws
Algorithm validation evidence artifacts
Alignment statistics (identity / similarity / gaps)
Allele & genotype frequencies (MAF, MAF filtering)
Allele-specific copy number + tumor purity/ploidy fit (ASCAT / ASPCF / subclonal / multiplicity)
Alpha diversity (within-sample diversity indices)
Alternative splicing: event classification + Percent-Spliced-In (PSI / Ψ, ΔPSI)
Ancestry estimation (supervised/projection ADMIXTURE)
Aneuploidy detection (copy number from read depth)
Antibiotic-resistance gene detection (ResFinder-style identity/coverage dual-threshold best-match screen)
Approximate pattern matching with mismatches (Hamming ball / d-neighborhood)
Architecture testing (ArchUnitNET) — preventing dependency drift at the IL level
Assembly statistics (N50 / L50 / Nx / Lx / auN)
Asynchronous k-mer counting (cancelable, progress-reporting count wrapper)
Average Nucleotide Identity (ANI)
Ingestion backlog — docs/algorithms reconciliation + queued sources
Sequence composition (base/residue counts, fractions, GC content)
BED format parsing (0-based half-open intervals)
Beta diversity (between-sample dissimilarity: Bray-Curtis + Jaccard)
Bisulfite sequencing methylation calling
Both-strand (additive / kPAL-balance) k-mer counting
Breakpoint detection from split (soft-clipped) reads
Build-time quality gate (Sonar ratchet + warnings-as-errors)
Cancer cell fraction (CCF) estimation + 1D clonal/subclonal clustering
Cancer variant tier classification (AMP/ASCO/CAP 2017 four-tier)
Centromere analysis (arm-ratio class + alpha-satellite / HOR / SF)
Characterization testing — pinning current behavior before a refactor
Chromatin state prediction (ChromHMM-style histone-mark annotation)
Chromothripsis inference (Korbel & Campbell hallmark criteria — oscillating CN states + breakpoint clustering)
Clinical actionability assessment (OncoKB therapeutic levels of evidence)
Clonal hematopoiesis (CHIP) filtering for cfDNA liquid biopsy
Clonal vs subclonal classification (CCF posterior, Landau/ABSOLUTE)
Coding potential (CPAT hexamer usage-bias score)
Codon Adaptation Index (CAI)
Codon optimization (OptimizeSequence)
Codon usage table and TVD comparison
Coiled-coil prediction (heptad a/d hydrophobic-core occupancy)
Combinatorial / pairwise testing — covering parameter interactions minimally
Common protein motifs (built-in PROSITE-pattern dictionary scan)
Consensus from a multiple alignment (most-frequent residue, alphabetical tie-break)
Consensus sequence computation (column-wise majority/threshold)
Conserved gene clusters (common intervals)
Contig merging (suffix–prefix overlap collapse / superstring merge)
Copy-number alteration classification (log2 ratio → absolute CN → CNA state, CNVkit thresholds)
Coverage / sequencing-depth calculation (per-base depth, breadth, average)
CpG site & CpG-island detection (Gardiner-Garden & Frommer)
ctDNA detection (Poisson LoD) and tumor-fraction estimation
De Bruijn graph assembly (k-mer graph + Eulerian-walk reconstruction)
Definition of Done (test units)
Differential expression analysis (log2 fold change + Welch's t-test + Benjamini-Hochberg FDR)
Differential testing — cross-checking two independent implementations
Differentially methylated region (DMR) detection
Dinucleotide composition & relative abundance (Karlin genomic signature)

Effective Number of Codons (ENC / Nc)

Gene-expression z-score outlier + combined-z signature score
Expression quantification (TPM / FPKM / RPKM + quantile normalization)
FASTQ quality statistics (Q20/Q30, mean, median, min/max, std dev)

Functional prediction (homology-based annotation transfer + hypergeometric pathway ORA)
Fusion breakpoint reading-frame consequence + fusion protein prediction
Fuzzing — random/malformed/boundary input for crashes and unhandled exceptions
Gene-fusion detection from split + spanning reads (with in-frame codon-phase check)
Gene-fusion HGNC designation + directional known-fusion lookup
Gene structure prediction (intron/exon): donor+acceptor pairing, exon typing/phase, spliced sequence
Genetic code (codon → amino-acid translation tables)
Genetic diversity statistics (π, Watterson's θ, Tajima's D, heterozygosity)
Genome comparison pipeline (core/dispensable partition + syntenic fraction)

Variant calling (SNP/indel from reference↔query alignment + Ti/Tv)

Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium test (chi-square)

k-mer Euclidean distance (alignment-free word-frequency distance)

Multiple sequence alignment (MSA)
